name: Vanishing Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and sugars until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs and vanilla.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt; stir into the mixture.
5. Stir in oats and raisins.
6. Drop by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Cool on wire racks.
